# terrible_community_hrobot_storagebox_snapshot (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `storagebox_id` (Number) The ID of the storage box to snapshot.

### Optional

- `hetzner_token` (String)
- `snapshot_comment` (String) The comment to set for the snapshot.
- `snapshot_name` (String) The name of the snapshot to comment or delete. The snapshot name is automatically generated and should not be specified when creating a snapshot. Required when setting `state` to `absent`, or when `snapshot_comment` is specified.
- `state` (String) The state of the snapshot.

### Read-Only

- `snapshot` (String) The snapshot that was created or updated.
